2604.14712.title: SGA-MCTS: Decoupling Planning from Execution via Training-Free Atomic Experience Retrieval
2604.14712.paper_summary: LLM-powered systems require complex multi-step decision-making abilities to solve real-world tasks, yet current planning approaches face a trade-off between the high latency of inference-time search and the limited generalization of supervised fine-tuning. To address this limitation, we introduce \textbf{SGA-MCTS}, a framework that casts LLM planning as non-parametric retrieval. Offline, we leverage Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to explore the solution space and distill high-fidelity trajectories into State-Goal-Action (SGA) atoms. These atoms are de-lexicalized primitives that abstract concrete entities into symbolic slots, preserving reusable causal logic while discarding domain-specific noise. Online, a retrieval-augmented agent employs a hybrid symbolic-semantic mechanism to fetch relevant SGAs and re-ground them into the current context as soft reasoning hints. Empirical results on complex benchmarks demonstrate that this paradigm enables frozen, open-weights models to match the performance of SOTA systems (e.g., GPT-5) without task-specific fine-tuning. By effectively amortizing the heavy computational cost of search, SGA-MCTS achieves System 2 reasoning depth at System 1 inference speeds, rendering autonomous planning both scalable and real-time feasible.
2604.14712.paper_summary_zh: LLM 驅動的系統需要複雜的多步驟決策能力來解決現實世界的任務，然而當前的規劃方法在推理時間搜索的高延遲和監督式微調的有限泛化之間面臨權衡。為了解決這一限制，我們引入了 \textbf{SGA-MCTS}，一個將 LLM 規劃視為非參數檢索的框架。在離線階段，我們利用蒙特卡羅樹搜索（MCTS）來探索解決方案空間，並將高保真度的軌跡提煉為狀態-目標-行動（SGA）原子。這些原子是去詞彙化的原始元素，將具體實體抽象為符號槽，保留可重用的因果邏輯，同時捨棄特定領域的噪音。在在線階段，增強檢索的代理使用混合符號-語義機制來獲取相關的 SGA，並將其重新嵌入當前上下文作為軟推理提示。對於複雜基準的實證結果顯示，這一範式使得凍結的、開放權重的模型能夠匹配 SOTA 系統（例如 GPT-5）的性能，而無需特定任務的微調。通過有效地攤銷搜索的高計算成本，SGA-MCTS 以系統 2 的推理深度達到系統 1 的推理速度，使自主規劃既具可擴展性又能實時可行。
2604.14712.author: Xin Xie et.al.
2604.14712.authors: Xin Xie, Dongyun Xue, Wuguannan Yao, Mingxiao Feng, Wengang Zhou, Xiang Qi, Houqiang Li, Peng Zhang
